ios.postInstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='node_modules/react-native/scripts/cocoapods/spm.rb';if(fs.existsSync(p)){let c=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8');c=c.replace(/package_product_dependencies/g,'// package_product_dependencies');fs.writeFileSync(p,c);console.log('SPM patch applied');}else{console.log('spm.rb not found');}"
